name: db-connect-mcp
description: Read-only database explorer for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and ClickHouse

ssh_host.title: SSH Host
ssh_host.description: SSH tunnel host (optional, for tunneled connections)

tools.name: get_database_info
tools.description: Get database information including version, size, and capabilities

tools.name: list_schemas
tools.description: List all schemas/databases in the database instance

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List all tables and views in a schema

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Get comprehensive table information including columns, indexes, and constraints

tools.name: analyze_column
tools.description: Get comprehensive column statistics including percentiles and distributions

tools.name: sample_data
tools.description: Sample data from a table efficiently

tools.name: execute_query
tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL query (SELECT, WITH, EXPLAIN)

tools.name: get_table_relationships
tools.description: Get foreign key relationships for a table

tools.name: explain_query
tools.description: Get query execution plan to analyze performance
